creator: terryl@iago.ienet.com
text:
960501-SNAP - on booting boot floppy, probe detects 2940 but after
	waiting for SCSI devices to settle, does not detect any SCSI devices
	and goes on to the next probe.  Tried on several systems.  Does it
	consistently on ASUS Triton II w/ 2940.

How-To-Repeat: 
	boot the boot floppy
